name: banner-ops
description: BannerOS — a mini banner management platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install && cd ../docs && npm install && cd ../mcp-server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run api" "npm run dashboard" "npm run docs"
scripts.build: cd dashboard && npm run build && cd ../docs && npm run build
